scripts.dev: concurrently "next dev" "npm --prefix integrations/cronograma-alunos/client run dev" "npm --prefix integrations/cronograma-alunos/server run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix integrations/cronograma-alunos/client run build && cp -r integrations/cronograma-alunos/client/dist/* public/cronograma-alunos-app/ && next build
